case_title: OZAN PAMIR VS. THE HIDDEN TABLE, INC

docket_entries.description: CHALLENGE OF VENUE FILED BY DEFENDANT THE HIDDEN TABLE, INC
NOTICE OF CHALLENGE OF VENUE -MAILED TO ALL PARTIES

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-25-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-18-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OZAN PAMIR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT THE HIDDEN TABLE, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY LINDA LANDERS (CEO). PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $1,760.00 COST OF CLAIM INCLUSIVE TO THE PLAINITT. DEFENDANT WROTE A CHECK FOR $1760.00 IN OPEN COURT. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE MAY 18, 2022 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,944.95 FILED BY PAMIR, OZAN AS TO DEFENDANT THE HIDDEN TABLE, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-25-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. FILED BY DEFENDANT THE HIDDEN TABLE, INC
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT ON APRIL 25,2022. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OZAN PAMIR. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT THE HIDDEN TABLE, INC. NO EXHIBITS. (506)
